ADDED TO CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES CALENDAR FOR MOTION BY EUGENE HILL TO DCCS RE: CANCEL (SET ASIDE) OF ORDER BASED ON PRESUMED INCOME & PROPOSED ANSWER ON JAN-08-2002 CONTINUED TO CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES CALENDAR ON APR-09-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 416 - PER JUDGE'S ORDER (416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; MOTHER NOT PRESENT, FATHER PRESENT IN PRO PER, CSA= MCCALLY; COURT SETS ASIDE PRESUMED INCOME OF JUDGMENT; COURT ORDERS THAT FATHER PAY CHILD SUPPORT $150 PER MONTH BY WAGE ASSIGNMENT COMMENCING 01/01/00; FATHER IS ORDERED TO SEEK AT LEAST FIVE JOBS EVERY TWO WEEKS; SEEK WORK LOGS PROVIDED THIS DATE ARE DUE AT THE DCSS OFFICE BY THE 5TH OF EACH MONTH IN THE ENVELOPES PROVIDED; COURT ORDERS FATHER'S DRIVER'S LICENSE BE RELEASED CONDITIONED UPON FATHER MAKING HIS ARREARS LIQUIDATION PAYMENTS IN A TIMELY MANNER; COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION TO COMMENCE CHILD SUPPORT THE FIRST DAY OF THE MONTH AFTER THE LIABLE PARENT GAINS EMPLOYMENT OR HAS INCOME; CONTINUED TO 04/09/02 @ 1:30PM 416. (WIGHTMAN) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LEWIS GILLIAN CSR #12355; CLERK: STEPHEN HEROLD.

(416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; MOTHER NOT PRESENT, FATHER NOT PRESENT, CSA=ITAYA; COURT ISSUES A BODY ATTACHMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500; AGENCY DIRECTED TO SEND COURTESY LETTER TO FATHER. (WIGHTMAN) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LEWIS GILLIAN CSR#12355
